title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
